title: Redirecting www to domain apex
excerpt: description: Redirect a www subdomain to your apex domain on Cloudflare Pages using Bulk Redirects. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Learn how to redirect a `www` subdomain to your apex domain (`example.com`). This setup assumes that you already have a [custom domain](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/configuration/custom-domains/) attached to your Pages project.
